hero.headline: Mitigate liquidity and compliance risk across the
hero.sub: An AI gate verifies the trade (invoice vs bill of lading), settlement clears in seconds on the regulated stablecoin rail Hong Kong just licensed, and every ledger reconciles itself. Proven live on the Africa–China corridor — the hardest one.

verdictStream.title: AI Compliance Gate
verdictStream.streamError: Verification stream unavailable — check the API route / chain bridge.

treasury.title: Treasury & Liquidity
treasury.settledCopy: FaanSail settled this cycle in seconds.
treasury.legacyDesc: Legacy correspondent banking pre-funds and clears over 3–5 days.
treasury.trappedDesc: This settlement amount no longer has to sit pre-funded in a nostro account across the clearing window — it stays available as working capital.
treasury.footnote: FaanSail compresses the pre-funding window and nets flows — it takes no FX risk; a licensed partner provides liquidity.

reconciliation.title: Reconciliation
reconciliation.headline: One event. Three parties.
reconciliation.legacyDesc: Legacy: days of manual matching across separate systems. FaanSail: automatic, from the single settlement event.
reconciliation.blockedDesc: Trade blocked by compliance gate — funds remain locked in escrow, all parties notified from the same event.
reconciliation.footnotePending: When the settlement event lands, every ledger reconciles to the same on-chain tx hash.
reconciliation.footnoteSettled: All three parties reconciled off one on-chain event — the same tx hash, no break to investigate.
reconciliation.footnoteBlocked: Funds held in escrow — compliance officer review required before release.
